HGSS.432.0000:
I’m the Day-Care Man.\f
We look after the precious Pokémon
of other Trainers.\f
If you’d like us to raise your
Pokémon, have a word with my wife.
HGSS.432.0001:
Ah, it’s you!\f
We were raising your Pokémon,
and my goodness, were we surprised!\f
Your Pokémon was holding an Egg!\f
We don’t know how it got there,
but your Pokémon had it.\f
You do want it, don’t you? [0200,0000]
HGSS.432.0002:
Ah, it’s you! Good to see you.
Your [0100,0000,0000]’s doing just fine.
HGSS.432.0003:
Well then, I’ll hang on to it.
Thanks!
HGSS.432.0004:
You have no room for it right now...
Come back when you’ve made room.
HGSS.432.0005:
[0103,0000,0000] received the Egg from
the Day-Care Man.
HGSS.432.0006: You take good care of it.
HGSS.432.0009:
Ah, it’s you!
Good to see you!\f
Your [0100,0000,0000] and [0100,0001,0000]
are doing just fine.\f
HGSS.432.0010:
I really will keep it.
You do want this Egg, yes? [0200,0000]
HGSS.432.0011:
Take good care of it!\f
That is, I don’t think we’ll ever find
another...\f
No, no, I’m sure we’ll find another one.
I’m definitely sure of it!\f
HGSS.432.0012:
Well all right then, I’ll take it.
Thank you.\f
That is, I don’t think we’ll ever find
another...\f
No, no, I’m sure we’ll find another one.
I’m definitely sure of it!\f
HGSS.432.0013:
[0103,0000,0000]...
If we are looking after your Pokémon\r
and notice one is holding an Egg, would\r
you like me to contact you by\r
phone? Would that be all right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.432.0014:
[0103,0000,0000]...
If we are looking after your Pokémon\r
and notice one is holding an Egg, would\r
you like me to contact you by\r
phone? Would that be all right? [0200,0000]
HGSS.432.0015:
You can leave it up to us!\f
Any Pokémon you’d like to have raised
you can leave in my wife’s care.
HGSS.432.0016:
I see. Well, that’s fine.\f
Any Pokémon you’d like to have raised
you can leave in my wife’s care.
HGSS.432.0017: The two seem to get along very well.
HGSS.432.0018: The two seem to get along.
HGSS.432.0019:
The two don’t seem to like each
other much.
HGSS.432.0020:
The two play with other
Pokémon rather than with each other...
HGSS.432.0021:
I’m the Day-Care Lady.
We can raise Pokémon for you.\f
Would you like us to raise your
Pokémon? [0200,0000]
HGSS.432.0022:
Which Pokémon should we raise for
you?\f
HGSS.432.0023:
Fine, we’ll raise your [0100,0000,0000]
for a while.\f
Come back for it later.\f
HGSS.432.0024:
We can raise two of your Pokémon.
Would you like us to raise another? [0200,0000]
HGSS.432.0025:
Ah, there you are!
My husband was looking for you.
HGSS.432.0028:
Do you want to take back the other
one, too? [0200,0000]
HGSS.432.0030:
Ah, it’s you! Good to see you.
Now, about your Pokémon...\f
HGSS.432.0031:
By level, your [0100,0000,0000] has
grown by about [0133,0001,0000].\f
HGSS.432.0032:
Your Pokémon team is full.
Make room, then come see me.
HGSS.432.0035:
[0103,0001,0000] took [0100,0000,0000] back
from the Day-Care Lady.\f
HGSS.432.0036:
Oh? But you only have one
Pokémon with you.\f
You can’t go off without a Pokémon.
Come back another time.
HGSS.432.0037: Do you want your Pokémon back? [0200,0000]
HGSS.432.0038:
If you leave me that Pokémon,
what are you gonna battle with?\f
Come back another time.
HGSS.432.0039:
Huh? Now, now.\f
If you leave that Pokémon with
me, you’ll be left with just one.\f
You will be better off if you catch
some more, if I do say so myself.
HGSS.432.0040:
Now, now.
That is merely an Egg!
HGSS.432.0041:
Fine, we’ll raise your [0100,0000,0000]
for a while.\f
Come back for it later.
